def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: Combining resting blood pressure and maximum heart rate may capture the cardiovascular load, providing better insights into heart health.
    New Feature 1: RestingBP_MaxHR | RestingBP_MaxHR = (RestingBP * MaxHR)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Thought 1: Combining resting blood pressure and maximum heart rate may capture the cardiovascular load, providing better insights into heart health.
    Thought 2: Calculating logarithmic values of serum cholesterol and oldpeak may help identify high and low values in the dataset.
    Thought 3: Grouping by fasting blood sugar and calculating the mean values of age, resting blood pressure, and maximum heart rate may help identify patterns in blood sugar levels.
    Thought 4: Calculating the groupby rank of cholesterol may help identify the most and least important cholesterol values in the dataset.
    Thought 5: Combining the numerical values of chest pain type, resting ECG, and ST slope may capture additional insights into the cardiovascular health of the patient.
    
    Thought 6: Feature 'ExerciseAngina' can be removed as it doesn't contribute much to the task. We can use 'Oldpeak' to understand the condition better which is related to exercise-induced angina.
    
    New Feature 1: RestingBP_MaxHR | RestingBP_MaxHR = (RestingBP * MaxHR)
    New Feature 2: LogCholesterol | LogCholesterol = Logarithm(Cholesterol)
    New Feature 3: LogOldpeak | LogOldpeak = Logarithm(Oldpeak)
    New Feature 4: FastingBS_Age | FastingBS_Age = GroupByThenMean(FastingBS, 'Age')
    New Feature 5: FastingBS_RestingBP | FastingBS_RestingBP = GroupByThenMean(FastingBS, 'RestingBP')
    New Feature 6: FastingBS_MaxHR | FastingBS_MaxHR = GroupByThenMean(FastingBS, 'MaxHR')
    New Feature 7: Cholesterol_Rank | Cholesterol_Rank = GroupByThenRank(Cholesterol)
    New Feature 8: ChestPainType_ST_slope | ChestPainType_ST_slope = ChestPainType + ST_Slope + RestingECG
    New Feature 9: ST_slope_RestECG_ChestPainType | ST_slope_RestECG_ChestPainType = ST_Slope + RestingECG + ChestPainType
    """
